questions.question: Who is the MD & CEO of HDFC Bank?
questions.ground_truth: Sasidhar Jagdishan is the Managing Director and CEO of HDFC Bank, a role he has held since October 2020.

questions.question: Where is HDFC Bank headquartered?
questions.ground_truth: HDFC Bank is headquartered in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

questions.question: When did the merger of HDFC Ltd with HDFC Bank take effect?
questions.ground_truth: The merger of HDFC Ltd (the parent housing-finance company) into HDFC Bank became effective on 1 July 2023.

questions.question: What sector and industry does HDFC Bank operate in?
questions.ground_truth: HDFC Bank operates in the Financial Services sector, in the banking industry (private-sector bank).
